meta.title: Avatar
meta.description: Identifier for groups and individuals — Square for organizations, Circle for people. Three sizes, randomized empty-state colors.

hero.title: Avatar
hero.desc: Avatar represents a specific group or user. In Zoomable Design System, it ships in Square and Circle types.

usage.title: Usage
usage.desc: Avatar splits into two by shape. Each type represents a different kind of entity and should be used distinctly.

rows.usage: Used as a thumbnail to represent an organization.
Used as a thumbnail to represent an individual person.

size.title: Size
size.desc: Avatar is available in three sizes.

color.title: Color
color.desc: Avatar's empty-state background uses five colors, assigned randomly. Drawn from the existing Color Palette, it pairs the 200 and 700 values of Blue, Green, Yellow, Red, and Gray.
